arts.ttl: Arne Slot sets Alisson injury return timeframe
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot expects goalkeeper Alisson Becker to return to the squad in December after being sidelined with a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Former Aston Villa, Liverpool and Crystal Palace striker makes MLS team of 2024 alongside Lionel Messi
arts.sum: The MLS have announced their Best XI of 2024, with former Red Devils Christian Benteke joining Lionel Messi as one of the forwards. The now 34-year-old has had a stellar…

arts.sum: Former Everton manager Sam Allardyce has had his say in the debate over Liverpool centre-back Virgil van Dijk

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe longs for new faces in a Newcastle squad that has gone stale
arts.sum: Key players are off form, there is unease behind the scenes and some fear the manager’s influence is waning as Liverpool come to town Something is wrong behind the scenes at St James’ Park this season and, albeit tacitly, Eddie Howe has admitted it. “We have had a lot of issues this summer and we continue to have them,” said Newcastle’s manager, somewhat cryptically, on Tuesday. “We’re not quite at our best. I’ve had several meetings with all the players to try and get them at their best levels to solve little issues we may have.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'They are so fast': Pep Guardiola names five Liverpool players who Man City just couldn't deal with
Arne Slot shut down £33m defender during private talks over Liverpool transfer
arts.sum: David Hancko played under Arne Slot at Feyenoord and was keen on joining his former boss at Liverpool earlier this summer but the Dutchman is said to have quickly poured cold water on the idea

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa has already proven Arne Slot right - but he can't avoid Liverpool sliding doors moment
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa is closing in on a Liverpool comeback after returning to full team training

arts.ttl: Newcastle United season ticket holders braced for price increase after long-term deal abolished
arts.sum: Newcastle Supporters Club stated today: "Direct debits for season ticket holders on the long-term deal will end in February." Some season ticket holders on the deal have told Chronicle Live they expect the price of their seat to increase significantly. The pricing for season tickets was on the agenda as the Fan Advisory Board met with commercial chief Peter Silverstone and the club's Chief Operating Officer Brad Miller .
